name: Box
price_basis: Personal Pro at EUR 12 monthly billing (pricing page serves euro-localized prices), checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KEEP: clients open your Box links and sign your files. Shared surfaces are a wall, not a subscription.
what_zo_builds: Zo builds the cleanup crew around Box: an automation that lists stale shared links and their last-open dates, a quarterly report of what actually gets downloaded, and a workspace mirror of final deliverables so your own copy never depends on a vendor. It should not become the place a client is asked to fetch a contract.
dont_kill_if: Keep it while outsiders touch it. If nothing has been shared in a year and Box is just cold storage for you alone, export everything and cancel; that is the one honest exit.
build_brief: Goal: keep Box for client-facing sharing but stop it from silently becoming my only copy. Export a file inventory, mirror final deliverables into /clients in my workspace, and record which shared links still get opened. Create a quarterly automation that flags links dead for 180 days and folders with no outside activity. If a full year passes with no external opens, prepare the export-and-cancel checklist. Done when every deliverable has a local mirror and the renewal decision has usage data behind it.
